## Improvements

Codex GPT-5.6 Sol Support — Miko now includes `GPT-5.6 Sol` in the Codex model catalog and uses it as the default Codex model for fresh sessions and default model preferences. GPT-5.6 Terra, GPT-5.6 Luna, GPT-5.5, and GPT-5.4 remain available.

## Validation

- `bun test src/server/provider-catalog.test.ts`
- `bun run lint`
- `bun run check`
